sources.title: Views Listing Analytics
sources.notes: Page view metric counting when someone views listing on eBay website or mobile app; for fixed price listings active 30+ days, count is rolling 30-day (not cumulative lifetime); eBay filters bot traffic with secondary daily analysis; distinct from impressions (times seen in search results); viewable in Active/Unsold pages in app, My eBay, Seller Hub Performance tab; recent technical issues with missing organic stats starting October 2025

sources.title: Visitor Counter for Listings
sources.notes: Optional listing counter feature showing view count; styles include basic, retro-computer, hidden; added via 'Visitor counter section' in listing form; not available in quick listing tool; File Exchange header field 'HitCounter' with values NoHitCounter, HonestyStyle, GreenLED, Hidden, BasicStyle, RetroStyle, HiddenStyle; counter removed when item ends; eBay shows view counts at top of listings

sources.title: Visits Traffic Metric
sources.notes: Total number of visits to eBay Store pages; key metric in Seller Hub traffic analytics; Store traffic reports track total visits or narrow to paid visits from Promoted Display ads; part of traffic report including unique visitors, page views, popular listings, search keywords; Analytics API returns buyer traffic details; recent changes to Traffic reports raised transparency concerns with sellers noting lack of critical information and granularity

sources.title: Visual Editor for Listing Templates

sources.title: WATA Grading Video Game Authentication

sources.title: Watch Count Analytics

sources.title: Watch This Item Button

sources.title: Watchers Count Listing Metric
sources.notes: Number of eBay shoppers who added listing to watch-list; watchers notified for every change until listing ends; viewable in Seller Hub, mobile app, Active Listing page (5th column); aggregate metrics only, individual watcher IDs kept private; distinct from views (impressions); count displayed when exceeds 5; eBay testing different display approaches to optimize sales

sources.title: Winning Notice Auction Notification
